title: RNA phenotypes, xQTLs, xTWAS weights, and xTWAS results for Geuvadis and GTEx using Pantry
author: Munro, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains RNA phenotyping genetic analysis results for 55 human tissue datasets using Pantry.  It includes RNA phenotypes, covariates, cis-QTL results from tensorQTL, and weights and associations for multimodal transcriptome-wide association study (xTWAS) results using FUSION, for six RNA modalities, for Geuvadis and 54 GTEx tissues. The xTWAS data covers 114 traits using GWAS data from  Publicly available GWAS summary statistics, harmonized and imputed to GTEx v8' variant reference . For more information, see the publication "Multimodal analysis of RNA sequencing data powers discovery of complex trait genetics".

For more information, see the publication "Multimodal analysis of RNA sequencing data powers discovery of complex trait genetics".
